name: @openviking/opencode-plugin
author: @openviking
description: Unified OpenCode plugin for OpenViking repository retrieval and long-term memory

scripts.check: node --check index.mjs && node --check lib/config.mjs && node --check lib/mcp-config.mjs && node --check lib/runtime.mjs && node --check lib/repo-context.mjs && node --check lib/memory-session.mjs && node --check lib/memory-recall.mjs && node --check lib/session-inject.mjs && node --check lib/viking-uri-guard.mjs && node --check lib/utils.mjs && node --check lib/shared/*.mjs && node --check servers/mcp-proxy.mjs && node --check scripts/setup.mjs && node --check tests/*.test.mjs
